fields.title: extension: scaffold project-local skill-marker extension
fields.description:
Create a project-local pi extension skeleton under ./.pi/extensions/skill-marker/ (index.ts + README).

Implementation notes:
- Must be auto-discovered by pi (project-local).
- No startup banners / console.log noise.
- Provide minimal configuration knobs (e.g. enable/disable, marker char) via constants or env vars.

DoD:
- .pi/extensions/skill-marker/index.ts exists and loads in pi without errors.
- README describes how to enable globally (copy to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/) if desired.
